meaning: 马尔马拉海(亚洲小亚细亚半岛和欧洲巴尔干半岛间的内海)
examples: Marmara is your mother and you'll always be our son.
Then came the Mavi Marmara flotilla incident: Israelis completely bungled the operation.
000 apartments were built to benefit victims left homeless after the Marmara earthquake.
Three bodies of water meet here: the Golden Horn, Bosphorus Strait and Sea of Marmara.
Ocalan is being held in a Turkish jail on an island in the Marmara Sea.
